rationale: Geophysical fluid dynamics (atmospheric/oceanic waves) is a genuinely different field from quantum algebra, so field_match fails. The stated mechanism is topological bulk-boundary correspondence (Chern number forcing chiral edge modes), whereas the reference mechanism is a Radford-type antipode identity (S^4 equals conjugation by a distinguished grouplike element, finite order modulo inner automorphisms with a trace/semisimplicity invariant); these denote entirely different machinery, so mechanism_match fails and the answer is not equivalent.
